message:
test(oracle): add 11 conformance tests for concat, IN+NULL, nested funcs, GROUP BY, CASE, UNION, joins

INSERT...SELECT with aggregates, string || operator, IN/NOT IN with NULL semantics,
nested function calls (upper/substr/replace/coalesce), GROUP BY expressions with
CASE/substr, multi-column UNIQUE constraints, CASE type coercion, DELETE with
subquery WHERE, UNION type affinity mixing, aggregates over all-NULL groups,
complex JOIN ON conditions with OR/self-join.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
